title: Tool library
description: Discover public and workspace-shared MCP servers, skills, and plugins.

empty.title: No tools match these filters
empty.description: Change the search or filters, or share the first workspace tool.

detail.tagNotice: A tag can move in its source repository. Only a commit SHA provides strong immutability.
detail.verificationNotice: Source verification means the registered URL and ref were checked. It is not an official endorsement or security audit.
detail.blockedDescription: An administrator blocked workspace access for the following reason.

install.title: Install on my devices
install.description: toard sends desired state; the connected shim verifies the source and applies it to Codex and Claude Code.
install.installAllDevicesDescription: Also applies automatically to devices connected later.
install.noDevices: Connect a device in Settings first.
install.nextShimRun: After saving, online devices apply it on the next shim sync (normally within 60 seconds).
install.versionUnavailable: An automatic installation version is not ready yet
install.versionUnavailableDescription: You can inspect the source and permissions, but installation waits for an immutable manifest.
install.settingsRequiredCommand: Run when local setup is required
install.excludeTeamDefault: Exclude this team default for my account
install.excluded: This team default is excluded for your account.

teamDeployment.title: Team default deployment
teamDeployment.description: Members can opt out, while new versions expand automatically from a small device cohort.
teamDeployment.notDeployed: This is not currently a team default.
teamDeployment.approvePermissions: Approve permission changes and start canary
teamDeployment.rolloutNotice: Expands from at least one device and 10%, to 50%, then 100%; two failures or 20% triggers automatic recovery.

form.title: Share a tool
form.description: Share a Git source and safe metadata. Secrets and local files are never uploaded.
form.editDescription: Changing metadata resets an existing verification back to community status.
form.publishNotice: The item appears in the workspace as community content. Administrators only verify or block it afterward.
form.editNotice: Previous verification does not cover changed content, so saving removes the verified badge.
form.name: Name
form.slugHelp: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
form.sourceUrlHelp: Credentials, localhost, and private-network URLs are rejected.
form.sourceRefHelp: Enter a tag such as v1.2.3 or a full 40-character commit SHA.
form.inventoryItemKeyHelp: This must exactly match the tool name in device configuration to connect installation status.
form.linesHelp: Enter one per line. Do not enter values or URL paths.

errors.duplicate: That URL identifier is already in use.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to edit this tool.
errors.save-failed: The tool could not be saved. Try again shortly.

errors.load: The tool could not be loaded.

admin.title: Tool moderation
admin.description: Verify or block items after they have been published without an approval gate.
